历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the lowest ranking for science was approximately 7465; in 2024, for the Physics Category, it was about 10311; in 2025, it was about 10086. Over the past 4 years, the ranking has shifted from 7465 to around 10086, a cumulative backward shift of about 2621 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10086. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for the Physics Category: 20 students in 2021, 19 in 2024, 14 in 2025, and only 2 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), a sharp reduction of about 85.7% compared to 2025. The significant reduction in the plan makes slots extremely scarce, which, according to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, will significantly affect admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shaanxi Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 63rd, with its ranking steadily rising in recent years (from 71st in 2021 to 63rd in 2026), indicating a steady improvement in overall strength, which continuously enhances its appeal to candidates. In 2024, there was negative public opinion related to teacher ethics, but no significant negative signals in 2025-2026. On Douyin, it ranks 15th in overall popularity (high heat), with positive content such as handwritten admission letters widely disseminated, leading to relatively high attention, which helps boost application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, disciplines such as Psychology (A-) and Education (A-) are related to some Physics Category enrollment majors (e.g., Psychology). As one of the six normal universities directly under the Ministry of Education, its overall strength in normal disciplines is relatively strong, providing sustained appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation was assessed as 'highly recommended'. These popular majors are highly relevant to the Physics Category enrollment directions (e.g., Computer Science, Mathematics) of this university, driving up application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Gansu Province is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025. Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 147,623 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 22% compared to 2025 (121,443), intensifying overall competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Gansu, with a superior geographical location, exerting a strong geographical appeal to Gansu candidates. In 2026, only 2 students will be admitted in the Physics Category, making slots extremely scarce, which will further intensify competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the historical trend of ranking backward shifts, the extreme scarcity of slots due to the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (only 2 students), the notable increase in Physics Category candidates in Gansu Province (about +22%), the steady improvement in university level, and the high popularity of majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, and taking into account the combined effects of expanded candidate pool and popular majors driving up competition, after moderate adjustment, the predicted lowest ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 4949, with a range of 4449-5449.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, only 2 students will be admitted in the Physics Category (1 each in Food Science and Engineering, and Business Administration), with very few slots. For rankings within the predicted range (4449-5449), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice; Tier 1 majors require rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range to be attempted; Tier 3 majors can serve as a safety net. Due to significant adjustments in enrollment majors compared to previous years, it is essential to closely monitor the latest enrollment catalog when applying.
